compiled_state.title: Add structural boundary tests for SC coverage tier fail-open and MISSING-gap trigger language in SKILL.md
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## What
Add two missing structural boundary tests to test-sprint-sc-coverage-escalation.sh:
1. Test that SKILL.md contains fail-open language for sonnet and opus tiers (analogous to test_sc_coverage_haiku_gate_fail_open in the haiku gate test)
2. Test that SKILL.md contains language about routing on MISSING SCs (the 5-SC gap scenario DD is about verifying REPLAN_TRIGGER triggers when SCs are missing)

Per behavioral testing standard Rule 5: for instruction files, test the structural boundary (that SKILL.md contains the right patterns), not execution behavior.

## Why
The completion verifier flagged 2 missing done definitions for story 536e-3683.

## Done Definition
- test_has_sonnet_fail_open_language: SKILL.md contains fail-open language in the sonnet tier context
- test_has_opus_fail_open_language: SKILL.md contains fail-open language in the opus tier context
- test_has_missing_sc_triggers_replan: SKILL.md contains language that MISSING SCs trigger REPLAN_TRIGGER
